title: euonymus hamiltonianus var. nikoensis
intro: Euonymus hamiltonianus var. nikoensis, also known as Korean spindle or Japanese spindle, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Euonymus hamiltonianus var. nikoensis are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or as a dried powder, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
